name: ExtensionAdministrableProductDefinition_Property
title: R5: Characteristics e.g. a product's onset of action (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `AdministrableProductDefinition.property` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`AdministrableProductDefinition.property` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `AdministrableProductDefinition.property` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `AdministrableProductDefinition.property` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `AdministrableProductDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `AdministrableProductDefinition.property` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
